Metadata.title: LumenLingo — Master Languages Through Immersive Experiences
Metadata.description: Download LumenLingo, the premium language learning app for iPhone. Beautiful flashcards, adaptive practice, ambient soundscapes, and more. Free on the App Store.

Hero.headline: Master Languages <gradient>Through Immersive</gradient> Experiences
Hero.subheadline: A visual journey through language learning. Beautiful flashcards, ambient soundscapes, and breathing exercises — designed to make every session feel like a meditation.

FeatureShowcase.heading: Everything You Need to Master a New Language
FeatureShowcase.description: Six powerful pillars designed to transform how you learn, practice, and retain new languages.
FeatureShowcase.immersiveFlashcardsDesc: Beautifully designed cards with spaced repetition, swipe gestures, and visual feedback that makes memorisation feel effortless.
FeatureShowcase.smartPracticeDesc: Three distinct modes — multiple choice, word builder, and grammar quizzes — that adapt to your level and keep you engaged.
FeatureShowcase.richSoundscapesDesc: 12 ambient environments — from tropical rain to deep space — that reduce anxiety and boost focus during study sessions.
FeatureShowcase.breathingOrbsDesc: Guided breathing exercises with mesmerising visual orbs that calm the mind before or between practice sessions.
FeatureShowcase.languagePairsDesc: Learn in any direction across 9 languages. Study Spanish from English, Japanese from German, or any combination.
FeatureShowcase.progressTrackingDesc: Detailed analytics, daily streaks, XP milestones, and mastery indicators that show exactly how far you've come.

ScreenshotGallery.heading: Designed to Inspire
ScreenshotGallery.description: Every screen crafted with intention. Swipe through and see the attention to detail that makes LumenLingo unique.

Differentiators.heading: Why LumenLingo?
Differentiators.description: More than a language app — it's a mindful learning experience designed to be as beautiful as it is effective.
Differentiators.designDesc: Every pixel crafted with care. Dark-mode-first, silk-smooth animations, and a cosmic aesthetic that makes learning feel premium.
Differentiators.environmentsDesc: 12 unique soundscapes and animated backgrounds transform your study session into a meditative retreat.
Differentiators.practiceModesDesc: Flashcards, grammar quizzes, and word builder — each with unique mechanics, visual feedback, and adaptive difficulty.
Differentiators.mindfulnessDesc: Breathing orbs, ambient sounds, and calming visuals reduce anxiety and create the perfect headspace for learning.

CTA.heading: Start Your Language Journey <gradient>Today</gradient>
CTA.description: Download LumenLingo free on the App Store. Premium tiers available for serious learners.

Pricing.heading: Choose Your Learning Journey
Pricing.description: Start for free, upgrade when you're ready. Every tier builds on the last, so you never lose access to core features.
Pricing.trialBadge: Try Royal-level access free for 14 days

comparison.heading: Compare All Features
comparison.description: Every tier builds on the one before it. Higher tiers include all features from lower tiers.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about LumenLingo's pricing and subscriptions.

Features.heading: Crafted for Serious Learners
Features.description: Every feature in LumenLingo is designed with cognitive science in mind. From spaced repetition to ambient immersion, discover what makes learning with us different.

walkthroughs.heading: See it in action
walkthroughs.description: Three core experiences that define the LumenLingo journey.

languagePairs.heading: Language Pairs
languagePairs.description: Learn in any direction. Hover any card to see a sample flashcard.
languagePairs.comingSoonDesc: More languages and pairs are on the way. Join early access to be the first to know.

About.heading: About LumenShore
About.description: The story behind the app, what drives us, and where we're headed.

values.beautyDesc: We believe tools for the mind should be beautiful. Every pixel, every animation, every interaction is designed to delight.
values.scienceDesc: Spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving — grounded in decades of cognitive science research.
values.privacyDesc: Your data stays on your device and in your iCloud. We don't sell data, track behaviour, or serve ads.
values.accessibleDesc: Full VoiceOver support, Dynamic Type, and Reduce Motion. Language learning should be for everyone.

timeline.sparkDesc: LumenShore was founded with a simple belief: language learning apps can be beautiful, mindful, and effective — all at once.
timeline.betaDesc: The first version of LumenLingo shipped to beta testers. Flashcards, soundscapes, and the core learning loop took shape.
timeline.launchDesc: LumenLingo launched worldwide on the App Store with 9 languages, 25+ pairs, and a five-tier membership model.
timeline.growingDesc: New languages, new features, and a growing community of learners discovering a more beautiful way to learn.

Contact.heading: Have a question?
Contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for in the FAQ? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.faqDescription: Quick answers to the most common questions about LumenLingo.

Download.heading: LumenLingo
Download.description: Master languages through immersive experiences. Beautiful, mindful, effective.
Download.meta: Free to start · No account required · iPhone & iPad

benefits.flashcardsDesc: Swipe-based cards with stunning visuals and spaced repetition built in.
benefits.practiceDesc: Three modes that adjust to your level — from beginner to advanced.
benefits.soundscapesDesc: 12 immersive environments that transform your study sessions.

Download.upgradeNote: Free to start. Pro, Elite, and Royal tiers available in-app.

qr.heading: Scan to download
qr.description: Point your iPhone camera at the QR code to download LumenLingo from the App Store.
qr.fallback: Or visit lumenlingo.com/open on your phone

showcase.heading: Designed to delight
showcase.description: Every interaction is crafted with care. Silk-smooth animations, thoughtful haptics, and an interface that feels alive.

blogCTA.heading: Enjoying this article?
blogCTA.description: Get language learning insights, app updates, and study tips delivered to your inbox.

EarlyAccess.heading: Be Among the First
EarlyAccess.description: LumenLingo is expanding. Join the list to get early access and exclusive launch offers.
EarlyAccess.socialProof: {count, plural, one {# learner already waiting} other {# learners already waiting}}

form.languageLabel: Which language do you want to learn?
form.privacy: No spam. We respect your privacy.

form.successDescription: We'll let you know as soon as early access opens.

referral.shareText: I just joined the LumenLingo early access list! Master a new language through multi-sensory immersion. Join me: {url}

completion.description: Love it? The real experience is even better — with 9 languages, adaptive learning, ambient soundscapes, and thousands of flashcards.

NotFound.heading: Lost in the Cosmos
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for has drifted away. Let us help you find your way.

Error.heading: Something Unexpected Happened
Error.description: Don't worry — the cosmos is vast, and minor disruptions happen. Let's get you back on track.

Offline.heading: You're Offline
Offline.description: The LumenLingo app works beautifully offline with a Pro subscription or higher. Download it and never miss a practice session.

Footer.tagline: Master a new language through multi-sensory immersion. Beautiful flashcards, ambient soundscapes, and adaptive practice that fits your life.

newsletter.heading: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subheading: Learning tips, app updates & community highlights.

Footer.madeIn: Made with care in the United Kingdom

NetworkStatus.offline: You're offline — some features may be unavailable
